assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response configures Saturday 2-6 AM maintenance window with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern, and provides alternative Sunday option

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Commands include all required flags: --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence with proper FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA syntax

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides example Q1 code freeze exclusion (March 1-31) using --add-maintenance-exclusion commands with 30-day duration

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Shows 'annual-audit-freeze-1' exclusion specifically for November 1-30 period using proper gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 30-day limit and demonstrates chaining exclusions with 48-hour gaps for longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or clarify this distinction

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended channel specifically for maximum control, explains benefits, and shows migration command

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: All exclusion commands include required flags: --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
